newsSince: GlobalWafers' Q1 2026 was soft (revenue NT$13.99B, -3.6% QoQ / -10.3% YoY, GM 20.8%), but management guided FY26 to exceed FY25 with 12-inch wafer pricing improvement anticipated in 2H 2026, and chair Doris Hsu reiterated that AI/HPC and advanced-packaging complexity sustain long-term demand for advanced 12-inch silicon wafers. A genuine 2H pricing-inflection signal supports the AI-fab wafer bottleneck case.

sources.label: GlobalWafers price increase, Asia capacity fully booked, square wafers 4Q26 (Digitimes)
GlobalWafers sees 1Q26 wafer prices bottoming, capacity boosts revenue (DigiTimes)

verdicts.rankRationale: Since Jun 9: H2 12-inch price hikes, tightening supply, rising long-term agreements and 300mm capacity push for AI/power chips materially confirm the AI-fab/HBM wafer-capacity bottleneck thesis. Pricing power inflecting upward is a genuine alpha-positive on the AI-nodes lens despite +151% YTD.
verdicts.bull: 12-inch supply tight; H2 price hikes + LTAs = pricing power inflection directly levered to AI/HBM fab build-out.
verdicts.neutral: Cyclical materials name; pricing recovery real but margins still ramping with capacity costs.
verdicts.bear: +151% YTD and at all-time highs; wafer demand is cyclical and capex-heavy if AI build slows.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: wafers are an indirect, 'less-glamorous' lever to the semiconductor buildout, only loosely tied to co-packaged optics. Tightening capacity and H2 pricing modestly strengthen the materials case (small +1) but indirectness and +150% YTD argue against moving up the rank. Hold at 13.
verdicts.bull: Materials choke point with restored pricing power; fully-booked capacity underpins the whole AI build, including optics-bearing packages.
verdicts.neutral: Real bottleneck but only indirectly tied to the CPO/HBM/package/test focus of this page.
verdicts.bear: Cycle- and capex-exposed; CPO relevance is indirect; valuation rich after a large run.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Wafer price hikes / square-wafer and GaN ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Wafer cycle and capex; indirect CPO linkage
